title: dianthus multiceps subsp. multiceps
intro: Dianthus multiceps subsp. multiceps, also known as pink or wild pink, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus multiceps subsp. multiceps include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and folk medicine.
